productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Diving Dragon Peach T-Shirt
description: Composition Coral coloured round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic on the front and back and distressed edges of collar, cuffs and hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron on embellishments This tee from ed hardy has a great print on front and back inspired by tattoo designs – wear this to complement your own tats. Subtle distressing on the hems and print gives a worn look – ed hardy are right on trend with the lived-in look of their clothing. Model's statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
